title: troximon aurantiacum var. purpureum
intro: Troximon aurantiacum var. purpureum, also known as Purple Safflower, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Purple Safflower include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Purple Saffflower may include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
